title: ✨Moths Origins SMP✨
body:
This pack was made for a white list only server please go to the discord server to get whitelisted. Our server is very small and costs money to run so your request to join may be denied.

Credit for the [Map](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/ikalyx/) we use on the server goes to [McMeddon](https://mcmeddon.com/) from [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/mcmeddon/).
